results.description: Curved (sine) annular support: annulus O-grid on a non-planar surface, where the true normal legitimately rotates around the ring.
Gently curved paraboloid sheet: curvature fidelity without creases.
Two planes with a sharp crease: voxel-boundary and multi-patch behavior.
Two close parallel planar sheets: layer separation vs. mid-plane merging.
Same smooth sheet as 'sine' but with a dense central cluster plus sparse background: stresses density-adaptive voxel subdivision (run with --adaptive-voxel to exercise it).
